message:
fix(daemon): seed convoy high-water marks on startup, bump beads to v0.53.1-pre

Prevents the first event poll tick from replaying all historical close
events. seedHighWaterMarks queries the current max event ID from each
store when stores first become available (both eager and lazy paths).

Also bumps beads to include Storage interface additions
(GetDependentsWithMetadata, GetDependenciesWithMetadata, GetIssuesByIDs,
GetAllEventsSince) and removes the l0g1x/beads fork replace directive.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
